title: ardisia subtilis
intro: Ardisia subtilis, also known as the small bala or bala, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Primulaceae. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Ardisia subtilis is known to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its therapeutic properties.
